title: Time Tracking Widget for iOS / Android
excerpt: I spend a lot of time away from my desk. I’d love to be able to easily track my time when on the go. An iOS / Android widget that brings current / recent time trackers onto the homescreen of my mobile phone would be grea…

posts.author: P_Cook (Paul Cook)
posts.cookedHtml: I spend a lot of time away from my desk. I’d love to be able to easily track my time when on the go. An iOS / Android widget that brings current / recent time trackers onto the homescreen of my mobile phone would be great. It would allow me to start / pause a collection of time tracking cells - perhaps the 5 I’ve used most recently?
